factors.claim: Kansas City's offense ranks top-5 in EPA/play this season
evidence: KC ranked #3 in offensive EPA/play through Week 18 (0.142)
Mahomes averaging 8.4 YPA in playoffs, career high
Kelce's target share increased to 31% in postseason

factors.claim: Opponent defensive line generates pressure above league average
evidence: Opponent pass rush win rate 48% (7th in NFL)
KC offensive line allowed 2.3 sacks/game in playoffs
Interior pressure specifically challenges Mahomes -- 71.2 passer rating when pressured up the middle

factors.claim: Historical Super Bowl favorite covers at a reliable rate
evidence: Favorites have won 57% of Super Bowls outright since 2000
3-point or smaller favorites win at 62% historically
Regression concern: small sample size (26 games)
KC has zero players on injury report as questionable or out
Opponent missing starting CB2 (torn ACL Week 17)
Injury edges are well-priced in by Super Bowl week -- limited alpha
Andy Reid 2-week preparation record: 7-2 after bye/extra rest
Reid's halftime adjustments ranked #1 by expected points added in 2nd half
Opponent coaching staff in first Super Bowl -- experience gap is real but hard to quantify
